final:
module gradient_descent (
    input [15:0] current_value,
    input [15:0] learning_rate,
    output [15:0] next_value
);
    assign next_value = current_value - learning_rate; // since gradient is 1
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      next_value <= current_value + learning_rate;
    end
  end

endmodule
